title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE REGION 1 MEDICAL CENTER IN THE CITY OF DAGUPAN, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, FROM SIX HUNDRED (600) TO ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED (1,500) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, May 14, 2025 p.11

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12203, May 08, 2025 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE REGION 1 MEDICAL CENTER IN THE CITY OF DAGUPAN, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, FROM SIX HUNDRED (600) TO ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED (1,500) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The authorized bed capacity of the Region 1 Medical Center (R1MC) in the City of Dagupan, Province of Pangasinan, shall be increased from six hundred (600 to one thousand five hundred (1,500) beds.

SEC. 2. The existing professional healthcare services and facilities of the R1MC shall also be upgraded to conform with and be commensurate to the increase in bed capacity as provided in Section 1 hereof.

SEC. 3. The existing workforce of the R1MC, which includes doctors, nurses, and support personnel, shall be increased correspondingly

SEC. 3. The existing workforce of the R1MC, which includes doctors, nurses, and support personnel, shall be increased correspondingly

SEC. 4. The Secretary of Health, after consultation with the Medical Center Chief of R1MC, and in coordination with the Secretary of the Department of Budget and Management and the Chairperson of the Civil Service Commission, determine the additional new positions to be created.

SEC. 5. The Secretary of Health shall immediately include in the Department's program the implementation of this Act, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 6. If any provision of this Act is declared unconstitutional, the remaining parts or provisions not affected shall remain in full force and effect.

SEC. 7. All laws, executive orders, issuances, and rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 7. All laws, executive orders, issuances, and rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 8. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which is originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives on March

18, 2024, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on February 3, 2025, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on February 5, 2025.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 08 2025

(SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
